summary: Team-shared lint and format checks; format check is local-only by design and the CI-only deploy gate runs in CI managed state.
operator_caveat: Local runs cover lint and format; the CI-only deploy gate is documented and never silently engaged from the local lane.

checks.summary: Lint team policy headers across the team-owned scope.
Format the team-owned tree against the bundled style table.
checks.parity_note: Local-only by design; the CI lane skips formatting and trusts the local pre-commit hook.

checks.summary: Deploy gate replay; managed entirely in the CI environment.
checks.parity_note: CI-only because the deploy gate needs the managed runner secrets bundle.

ownership_hints.summary: Team platform owners review policy lint scope changes.
ownership_hints.parity_note: Same owners apply in local and CI lanes.

parity_observations.summary: Policy lint runs identically in local and CI.
Format check stays local-only and is documented so CI does not silently re-run it.
Deploy gate stays CI-only and the local lane never auto-engages it.

unsupported_fields.summary: Vendor telemetry endpoint field is reserved for a future vendor extension and is ignored in alpha.
